description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal, dark-colored suit with a collared shirt underneath. The figure has a short, neatly groomed hairstyle and a trimmed beard, giving a professional appearance. The suit jacket is long and straight, paired with matching trousers that have subtle paneling at the knees. The shoes are blocky and formal, consistent with business attire. The hands are relaxed and positioned slightly away from the body, and the facial features are defined with a neutral expression. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average and proportionate.
description: A male adult in a formal suit with a collared shirt, short hair, and a trimmed beard, standing upright with a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight cut of the jacket and the profile of the face and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket and trousers, with arms and legs symmetrically positioned.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, jacket, and shoes.
